standard_rows: All standard rows preserve a consistent Doraemon identity and read correctly, including right/left drag facing, a clear jump arc, and clean transparency without clipping, overlap, or background panels.
directions: The labeled 16-direction loop follows the intended axes and quadrants monotonically with no visible snap or reversal.
warnings: Blind-review ambiguities and continuity metric spikes are non-blocking because labeled normal-size review confirms the intended directions.
